ht16k33_init.tooltip: Initialize the HT16K33 four-digit seven-segment digital tube, the default address is 0x70

ht16k33_simple_display.tooltip: Display numbers on the digital tube, automatically initialize and select display format

ht16k33_display_temperature.tooltip: Display temperature value, automatically add degree symbol

ht16k33_display_voltage.tooltip: Display voltage value, automatically format decimal places

ht16k33_clock_display.message0: The digital tube clock displays %1 hours %2 minutes %3 flashing colon
ht16k33_clock_display.tooltip: Display clock with flashing colon effect

ht16k33_countdown.message0: The digital tube countdown displays %1 seconds
ht16k33_countdown.tooltip: Display countdown seconds in the format MM:SS

ht16k33_display_int.message0: The digital tube displays an integer%1

ht16k33_display_float.message0: The digital tube displays decimal %1 and the number of decimal places %2

ht16k33_display_hex.tooltip: Displays hexadecimal numbers in the range 0000 to FFFF

ht16k33_display_time.message0: The digital tube displays the time%1:%2 and displays the colon%3

ht16k33_display_date.message0: The digital tube displays the date%1.%2

ht16k33_display_clear.tooltip: Clear the display content of the digital tube

ht16k33_set_brightness.tooltip: Set the brightness of the digital tube, the range is 0-15, 8 is medium brightness

ht16k33_set_blink.tooltip: Set the digital tube flashing mode

ht16k33_display_on_off.tooltip: Turn on or off the digital tube display

ht16k33_display_colon.tooltip: Control the display of the colon in the middle of the digital tube

ht16k33_display_test.tooltip: Execute the digital tube display test and light up all segments

ht16k33_sensor_display.message0: The digital tube displays the sensor value%1 label%2
ht16k33_sensor_display.tooltip: Display the sensor value and automatically add the corresponding label. After the display is completed, it will be paused for observation.

ht16k33_digital_clock.message0: Nixie tube digital clock display %1 Time acquisition method %2
ht16k33_digital_clock.tooltip: Displays digital clock, automatically calculating hours, minutes and seconds with flashing colon

ht16k33_score_display.message0: The digital tube displays the score%1

ht16k33_counter_display.message0: Digital tube counter %1 operation %2 step size %3
ht16k33_counter_display.tooltip: Simple counter function that can increment, decrement or reset
